2900	def _compute_mask_indptr(
2901	    qo_indptr: torch.Tensor, kv_indptr: torch.Tensor
2902	) -> torch.Tensor:
2903	    if len(qo_indptr) != len(kv_indptr):
2904	        raise ValueError("The length of qo_indptr and kv_indptr should be the same.")
2905	    mask_indptr = torch.empty_like(qo_indptr)
2906	    mask_indptr[0] = 0
2907	    mask_indptr[1:] = torch.cumsum(
2908	        (qo_indptr[1:] - qo_indptr[:-1]) * (kv_indptr[1:] - kv_indptr[:-1]),
2909	        0,
2910	    )
2911	    return mask_indptr

2914	class BatchPrefillWithRaggedKVCacheWrapper:
2915	    r"""Wrapper class for prefill/append attention with ragged (tensor) kv-cache for
2916	    batch of requests.
2917	
2918	    Check :ref:`our tutorial <kv-layout>` for ragged kv-cache layout.
2919	
2920	    Example
2921	    -------
2922	    >>> import torch
2923	    >>> import flashinfer
2924	    >>> num_layers = 32
2925	    >>> num_qo_heads = 64
2926	    >>> num_kv_heads = 16
2927	    >>> head_dim = 128
2928	    >>> # allocate 128MB workspace buffer
2929	    >>> workspace_buffer = torch.empty(128 * 1024 * 1024, dtype=torch.uint8, device="cuda:0")
2930	    >>> prefill_wrapper = flashinfer.BatchPrefillWithRaggedKVCacheWrapper(
2931	    ...     workspace_buffer, "NHD"
2932	    ... )
2933	    >>> batch_size = 7
2934	    >>> nnz_kv = 100
2935	    >>> nnz_qo = 100
2936	    >>> qo_indptr = torch.tensor(
2937	    ...     [0, 33, 44, 55, 66, 77, 88, nnz_qo], dtype=torch.int32, device="cuda:0"
2938	    ... )
2939	    >>> kv_indptr = qo_indptr.clone()
2940	    >>> q_at_layer = torch.randn(num_layers, nnz_qo, num_qo_heads, head_dim).half().to("cuda:0")
2941	    >>> k_at_layer = torch.randn(num_layers, nnz_kv, num_kv_heads, head_dim).half().to("cuda:0")
2942	    >>> v_at_layer = torch.randn(num_layers, nnz_kv, num_kv_heads, head_dim).half().to("cuda:0")
2943	    >>> # create auxiliary data structures for batch prefill attention
2944	    >>> prefill_wrapper.plan(
2945	    ...     qo_indptr,
2946	    ...     kv_indptr,
2947	    ...     num_qo_heads,
2948	    ...     num_kv_heads,
2949	    ...     head_dim,
2950	    ...     causal=True,
2951	    ... )
2952	    >>> outputs = []
2953	    >>> for i in range(num_layers):
2954	    ...     q = q_at_layer[i]
2955	    ...     k = k_at_layer[i]
2956	    ...     v = v_at_layer[i]
2957	    ...     # compute batch prefill attention, reuse auxiliary data structures
2958	    ...     o = prefill_wrapper.run(q, k, v)
2959	    ...     outputs.append(o)
2960	    ...
2961	    >>> outputs[0].shape
2962	    torch.Size([100, 64, 128])
2963	    >>>
2964	    >>> # below is another example of creating custom mask for batch prefill attention
2965	    >>> mask_arr = []
2966	    >>> qo_len = (qo_indptr[1:] - qo_indptr[:-1]).cpu().tolist()
2967	    >>> kv_len = (kv_indptr[1:] - kv_indptr[:-1]).cpu().tolist()
2968	    >>> for i in range(batch_size):
2969	    ...     mask_i = torch.tril(
2970	    ...         torch.full((qo_len[i], kv_len[i]), True, device="cuda:0"),
2971	    ...         diagonal=(kv_len[i] - qo_len[i]),
2972	    ...     )
2973	    ...     mask_arr.append(mask_i.flatten())
2974	    ...
2975	    >>> mask = torch.cat(mask_arr, dim=0)
2976	    >>> prefill_wrapper.plan(
2977	    ...     qo_indptr,
2978	    ...     kv_indptr,
2979	    ...     num_qo_heads,
2980	    ...     num_kv_heads,
2981	    ...     head_dim,
2982	    ...     custom_mask=mask
2983	    ... )
2984	    >>> outputs_custom_mask = []
2985	    >>> for i in range(num_layers):
2986	    ...     q = q_at_layer[i]
2987	    ...     k = k_at_layer[i]
2988	    ...     v = v_at_layer[i]
2989	    ...     # compute batch prefill attention, reuse auxiliary data structures
2990	    ...     o_custom = prefill_wrapper.run(q, k, v)
2991	    ...     assert torch.allclose(o_custom, outputs[i], rtol=1e-3, atol=1e-3)
2992	    ...
2993	    >>> outputs_custom_mask[0].shape
2994	    torch.Size([100, 64, 128])
2995	
2996	
2997	    Note
2998	    ----
2999	    To accelerate computation, FlashInfer's batch prefill/append attention operators
3000	    create some auxiliary data structures, these data structures can be reused across
3001	    multiple prefill/append attention calls (e.g. different Transformer layers). This
3002	    wrapper class manages the lifecycle of these data structures.
3003	    """
3004	
3005	    @flashinfer_api
3006	    def __init__(
3007	        self,
3008	        float_workspace_buffer: torch.Tensor,
3009	        kv_layout: str = "NHD",
3010	        use_cuda_graph: bool = False,
3011	        qo_indptr_buf: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
3012	        kv_indptr_buf: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
3013	        custom_mask_buf: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
3014	        mask_indptr_buf: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
3015	        backend: str = "auto",
3016	        jit_args: Optional[List[Any]] = None,
3017	        jit_kwargs: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,
3018	    ) -> None:
3019	        r"""Constructor of :class:`BatchPrefillWithRaggedKVCacheWrapper`.
3020	
3021	        Parameters
3022	        ----------
3023	        float_workspace_buffer : torch.Tensor
3024	            The user reserved float workspace buffer used to store intermediate attention results
3025	            in the split-k algorithm. The recommended size is 128MB, the device of the workspace
3026	            buffer should be the same as the device of the input tensors. The buffer must be
3027	            16-byte aligned; tensors created by ``torch.empty`` satisfy this on supported devices.
3028	
3029	        kv_layout : str
3030	            The layout of the input k/v tensors, could be either ``NHD`` or ``HND``.
3031	
3032	        use_cuda_graph : bool
3033	            Whether to enable CUDA graph capture for the prefill kernels, if enabled, the
3034	            auxiliary data structures will be stored as the provided buffers.
3035	
3036	        qo_indptr_buf : Optional[torch.Tensor]
3037	            The user reserved GPU buffer to store the ``qo_indptr`` array, the size of the buffer
3038	            should be ``[batch_size + 1]``.
3039	            This argument is only effective when ``use_cuda_graph`` is ``True``.
3040	
3041	        kv_indptr_buf : Optional[torch.Tensor]
3042	            The user reserved GPU buffer to store the ``kv_indptr`` array, the size of the buffer
3043	            should be ``[batch_size + 1]``.
3044	            This argument is only effective when ``use_cuda_graph`` is ``True``.
3045	
3046	        custom_mask_buf : Optional[torch.Tensor]
3047	            The user reserved GPU buffer to store the custom mask tensor, should be large
3048	            enough to store the maximum possible size of the packed custom mask tensor during the
3049	            lifetime of the wrapper. This argument is only effective when ``use_cuda_graph``
3050	            is ``True`` and custom mask will be used in attention computation.
3051	
3052	        mask_indptr_buf : Optional[torch.Tensor]
3053	            The user reserved GPU buffer to store the ``mask_indptr`` array, the size of the buffer
3054	            should be ``[batch_size]``.
3055	            This argument is only effective when ``use_cuda_graph`` is ``True`` and custom mask
3056	            will be used in attention computation.
3057	
3058	        backend : str
3059	            The implementation backend, could be ``auto``/``fa2``/``fa3``/``cudnn``/``cutlass``
3060	            or ``cute-dsl``.
3061	            Defaults to ``auto``.
3062	            If set to ``auto``, the wrapper will automatically choose the backend based on the
3063	            device architecture and kernel availability.
3064	            The ``cute-dsl`` backend uses the CuTe DSL attention kernel for Blackwell (SM100+).
3065	
3066	        jit_args : Optional[List[Any]]
3067	            If provided, the wrapper will use the provided arguments to create the JIT module,
3068	            otherwise, the wrapper will use default attention implementation.
3069	
3070	        jit_kwargs : Optional[Dict[str, Any]]
3071	            The keyword arguments to create the JIT module, defaults to None.
3072	        """
3073	        _check_kv_layout(kv_layout)
3074	        if jit_args is not None and backend != "cute-dsl":
3075	            if jit_kwargs is None:
3076	                jit_kwargs = {}
3077	            self._jit_module = get_batch_prefill_jit_module(
3078	                jit_args[0],
3079	                get_customize_batch_prefill_module(backend, *jit_args, **jit_kwargs),
3080	            )
3081	            # jit_args[7] is additional_tensor_names from gen_customize_batch_prefill_module
3082	            self._jit_additional_tensor_names = list(jit_args[7])
3083	        else:
3084	            self._jit_module = None
3085	            self._jit_additional_tensor_names = []
3086	
3087	        self._cute_dsl_wrapper = None
3088	        if backend == "cute-dsl":
3089	            from .cute_dsl.attention import BatchPrefillCuteDSLWrapper
3090	
3091	            self._cute_dsl_wrapper = BatchPrefillCuteDSLWrapper(
3092	                float_workspace_buffer, use_cuda_graph=use_cuda_graph
3093	            )
3094	
3095	        self._kv_layout = kv_layout
3096	        self._float_workspace_buffer = float_workspace_buffer
3097	        self.device = float_workspace_buffer.device
3098	        self._int_workspace_buffer = torch.empty(
3099	            (8 * 1024 * 1024,), dtype=torch.uint8, device=self.device
3100	        )
3101	        self._pin_memory_int_workspace_buffer = torch.empty(
3102	            self._int_workspace_buffer.shape,
3103	            dtype=torch.uint8,
3104	            pin_memory=True,
3105	            device="cpu",
3106	        )
3107	        self._use_cuda_graph = use_cuda_graph
3108	        if use_cuda_graph:
3109	            if not torch.is_tensor(qo_indptr_buf):
3110	                raise ValueError(
3111	                    "qo_indptr_buf should be a torch.Tensor in cuda graph mode"
3112	                )
3113	            if not torch.is_tensor(kv_indptr_buf):
3114	                raise ValueError(
3115	                    "kv_indptr_buf should be a torch.Tensor in cuda graph mode"
3116	                )
3117	            self._fixed_batch_size = len(qo_indptr_buf) - 1
3118	            if len(kv_indptr_buf) != self._fixed_batch_size + 1:
3119	                raise ValueError(
3120	                    "The length of kv_indptr_buf ({}) should be the same as qo_indptr_buf ({}).".format(
3121	                        len(kv_indptr_buf), self._fixed_batch_size
3122	                    )
3123	                )
3124	            # NOTE(Zihao): do not check custom_mask_buf and mask_indptr_buf here,
3125	            # as they may not be used.
3126	
3127	        self._qo_indptr_buf = qo_indptr_buf
3128	        self._kv_indptr_buf = kv_indptr_buf
3129	        self._custom_mask_buf = custom_mask_buf
3130	        self._mask_indptr_buf = mask_indptr_buf
3131	        self._max_total_num_rows: Optional[int] = None
3132	        self._backend = backend
3133	        self._cached_module = None
3134	
3135	    @property
3136	    def is_cuda_graph_enabled(self) -> bool:
3137	        return self._use_cuda_graph
3138	
3139	    def reset_workspace_buffer(
3140	        self, float_workspace_buffer: torch.Tensor, int_workspace_buffer
3141	    ) -> None:
3142	        r"""Reset the workspace buffer.
3143	
3144	        Parameters
3145	        ----------
3146	        float_workspace_buffer : torch.Tensor
3147	            The new float workspace buffer, the device of the new float workspace buffer should
3148	            be the same as the device of the input tensors.
3149	
3150	        int_workspace_buffer : torch.Tensor
3151	            The new int workspace buffer, the device of the new int workspace buffer should
3152	            be the same as the device of the input tensors.
3153	        """
3154	        self._float_workspace_buffer = float_workspace_buffer
3155	        self._int_workspace_buffer = int_workspace_buffer
3156	        self._pin_memory_int_workspace_buffer = torch.empty(
3157	            self._int_workspace_buffer.shape,
3158	            dtype=self._int_workspace_buffer.dtype,
3159	            device="cpu",
3160	            pin_memory=True,
3161	        )

3163	    @flashinfer_api
3164	    def plan(
3165	        self,
3166	        qo_indptr: torch.Tensor,
3167	        kv_indptr: torch.Tensor,
3168	        num_qo_heads: int,
3169	        num_kv_heads: int,
3170	        head_dim_qk: int,
3171	        head_dim_vo: Optional[int] = None,
3172	        custom_mask: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
3173	        packed_custom_mask: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
3174	        causal: bool = False,
3175	        pos_encoding_mode: str = "NONE",
3176	        use_fp16_qk_reduction: bool = False,
3177	        window_left: int = -1,
3178	        logits_soft_cap: Optional[float] = None,
3179	        sm_scale: Optional[float] = None,
3180	        rope_scale: Optional[float] = None,
3181	        rope_theta: Optional[float] = None,
3182	        q_data_type: Union[str, torch.dtype] = "float16",
3183	        kv_data_type: Optional[Union[str, torch.dtype]] = None,
3184	        o_data_type: Optional[Union[str, torch.dtype]] = None,
3185	        non_blocking: bool = True,
3186	        prefix_len_ptr: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
3187	        token_pos_in_items_ptr: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
3188	        token_pos_in_items_len: int = 0,
3189	        max_item_len_ptr: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
3190	        fixed_split_size: Optional[int] = None,
3191	        disable_split_kv: bool = False,
3192	        seq_lens: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
3193	        seq_lens_q: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
3194	        max_token_per_sequence: Optional[int] = None,
3195	        max_sequence_kv: Optional[int] = None,
3196	        v_indptr: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
3197	        o_indptr: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,
3198	    ) -> None:
3199	        r"""Plan batch prefill/append attention on Ragged KV-Cache for given problem specification.
3200	
3201	        Parameters
3202	        ----------
3203	        qo_indptr : torch.Tensor
3204	            The indptr of the query/output tensor, shape: ``[batch_size + 1]``.
3205	        kv_indptr : torch.Tensor
3206	            The indptr of the key/value tensor, shape: ``[batch_size + 1]``.
3207	        num_qo_heads : int
3208	            The number of query/output heads.
3209	        num_kv_heads : int
3210	            The number of key/value heads.
3211	        head_dim_qk : int
3212	            The dimension of the heads on query/key tensor.
3213	        head_dim_vo : Optional[int]
3214	            The dimension of the heads on value/output tensor.
3215	            If not provided, will be set to ``head_dim_qk``.
3216	        custom_mask : Optional[torch.Tensor]
3217	            The flattened boolean mask tensor, shape: ``(sum(q_len[i] * k_len[i] for i in range(batch_size))``.
3218	            The elements in the mask tensor should be either ``True`` or ``False``,
3219	            where ``False`` means the corresponding element in the attention matrix will be
3220	            masked out.
3221	
3222	            Please refer to the :ref:`mask layout <mask-layout>` for more details about flattened
3223	            layout of mask tensor.
3224	
3225	            When :attr:`custom_mask` is provided, and :attr:`packed_custom_mask` is not, the
3226	            function will pack the custom mask tensor into a 1D packed mask tensor, which introduces
3227	            additional overhead.
3228	        packed_custom_mask : Optional[torch.Tensor]
3229	            The 1D packed uint8 mask tensor, if provided, the :attr:`custom_mask` will be ignored.
3230	            The packed mask tensor is generated by :func:`flashinfer.quantization.packbits`.
3231	
3232	            If provided, the custom mask will be added to the attention matrix before softmax
3233	            and after scaling. The mask tensor should be in the same device as the input tensors.
3234	        causal : bool
3235	            Whether to apply causal mask to the attention matrix.
3236	            This argument is ignored if ``mask`` is provided in :meth:`plan`.
3237	        pos_encoding_mode : str
3238	            The position encoding applied inside attention kernels, could be
3239	            ``NONE``/``ROPE_LLAMA`` (LLAMA style rotary embedding) /``ALIBI``.
3240	            Default is ``NONE``.
3241	        use_fp16_qk_reduction : bool
3242	            Whether to use f16 for qk reduction (faster at the cost of slight precision
3243	            loss).
3244	        window_left : int
3245	            The left (inclusive) window size for the attention window, when set to ``-1``, the window
3246	            size will be set to the full length of the sequence. Defaults to ``-1``.
3247	        logits_soft_cap : Optional[float]
3248	            The attention logits soft capping value (used in Gemini, Grok and Gemma-2, etc.), if not
3249	            provided, will be set to ``0``. If greater than 0, the logits will be capped according to
3250	            formula:
3251	            :math:`\texttt{logits_soft_cap} \times \mathrm{tanh}(x / \texttt{logits_soft_cap})`,
3252	            where :math:`x` is the input logits.
3253	        sm_scale : Optional[float]
3254	            The scale used in softmax, if not provided, will be set to
3255	            ``1.0 / sqrt(head_dim_qk)``.
3256	        rope_scale : Optional[float]
3257	            The scale used in RoPE interpolation, if not provided, will be set to
3258	            ``1.0``.
3259	        rope_theta : Optional[float]
3260	            The theta used in RoPE, if not provided, will be set to ``1e4``.
3261	        q_data_type : Union[str, torch.dtype]
3262	            The data type of the query tensor, defaults to torch.float16.
3263	        kv_data_type : Optional[Union[str, torch.dtype]]
3264	            The data type of the key/value tensor. If None, will be set to :attr:`q_data_type`.
3265	        o_data_type : Optional[Union[str, torch.dtype]]
3266	            The data type of the output tensor. If None, will be set to :attr:`q_data_type`.
3267	            For FP8 inputs, this should typically be set to torch.float16 or torch.bfloat16.
3268	        non_blocking : bool
3269	            Whether to copy the input tensors to the device asynchronously, defaults to ``True``.
3270	        prefix_len_ptr :Optional[torch.Tensor]
3271	            prefix length. A uint32 1D tensor indicating the prefix length of each prompt. The tensor size is equal to the batch size.
3272	        token_pos_in_items_ptr : Optional[torch.Tensor]
3273	            A uint16 1D tensor (it will be converted to uint16 in flashinfer) indicating the token position of each item and started from 0 (delimiter)
3274	            for each item. E.g., if we have 3 items of length 3, 2, 4 respectively for this member. This vector will be looking like
3275	            `[0, 1, 2, 3, 0, 1, 2, 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 0]` with 4 delimiters indexed as 0. For batch size > 1,
3276	            we will concat them as 1D with zero paddings to make sure each has the same length, the padding length is defined by
3277	            `token_pos_in_items_len` - length of the raw `token_pos_in_items_ptr` for each prompt.
3278	        token_pos_in_items_len : int
3279	            zero padding length for `token_pos_in_items_ptr` to better handle the bsz > 1 case. Still using the above 3,2,4 example.
3280	            If we set `token_pos_in_items_len` to be 20, it will be  `[0, 1, 2, 3, 0, 1, 2, 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0]`
3281	            with 7 padded zeros. (note there're 8 zeros in the end where the first one is the delimiter token 0 in the end of the prompt)
3282	        max_item_len_ptr : Optional[torch.Tensor]
3283	            a uint16 vector contains the max token length of all items for each prompt
3284	        fixed_split_size : Optional[int],
3285	            The fixed split size for split-kv FA2 prefill/decode, in pages. Recommend setting to the average sequence length of your workload.
3286	            When enabled, will lead to deterministic softmax score reduction in the merge_states kernel, and therefore
3287	            batch-size invariant outputs. See https://thinkingmachines.ai/blog/defeating-nondeterminism-in-llm-inference/
3288	            Note that compatibility with CUDA graph is NOT guaranteed, as even when bs is fixed, kv seq len can change
3289	            and lead to a varied number of launched CTAs.
3290	        disable_split_kv : bool,
3291	            Whether to disable the split-kv for determinism in CUDA Graph, defaults to ``False``.
3292	        seq_lens: Optional[torch.Tensor]
3293	            A uint32 1D tensor indicating the kv sequence length of each prompt. shape: ``[batch_size]``.
3294	        seq_lens_q: Optional[torch.Tensor]
3295	            A uint32 1D tensor indicating the q sequence length of each prompt. shape: ``[batch_size]``.
3296	            If not provided, will be set to the same value as ``seq_lens``.
3297	        max_token_per_sequence: Optional[int],
3298	            Required for cudnn backend. This is the scalar max token length of each sequence.
3299	        max_sequence_kv: Optional[int],
3300	            Required for cudnn backend. This is the scalar max sequence length of each sequence in kv cache.
3301	        v_indptr: Optional[torch.Tensor]
3302	            Required for cudnn backend. This is the indptr of the value tensor.
3303	        o_indptr: Optional[torch.Tensor]
3304	            Required for cudnn backend. This is the indptr of the output tensor.
3305	        Note
3306	        ----
3307	        The :meth:`plan` method should be called before any :meth:`run` or
3308	        :meth:`run_return_lse` calls, auxiliary data structures will be created
3309	        during this plan call and cached for multiple kernel runs.
3310	
3311	        The ``num_qo_heads`` must be a multiple of ``num_kv_heads``. If ``num_qo_heads``
3312	        is not equal to ``num_kv_heads``, the function will use
3313	        `grouped query attention <https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.13245>`_.
3314	
3315	        The :meth:`plan` method cannot be used in Cuda Graph or in ``torch.compile``.
3316	        """
3317	        q_data_type = canonicalize_torch_dtype(q_data_type)
3318	        if kv_data_type is None:
3319	            kv_data_type = q_data_type
3320	        kv_data_type = canonicalize_torch_dtype(kv_data_type)
3321	        if o_data_type is None:
3322	            o_data_type = q_data_type
3323	        o_data_type = canonicalize_torch_dtype(o_data_type)
3324	        if head_dim_vo is None:
3325	            head_dim_vo = head_dim_qk
3326	        if fixed_split_size is None:
3327	            fixed_split_size = -1
3328	        if logits_soft_cap is None:
3329	            logits_soft_cap = 0.0
3330	
3331	        batch_size = len(qo_indptr) - 1
3332	        if len(kv_indptr) != batch_size + 1:
3333	            raise ValueError(
3334	                "The kv_indptr length should be equal to mask_indptr length."
3335	            )
3336	        if custom_mask is not None or packed_custom_mask is not None:
3337	            mask_indptr = _compute_mask_indptr(qo_indptr, kv_indptr)
3338	        if packed_custom_mask is None and custom_mask is not None:
3339	            # create packed custom mask from custom mask
3340	            packed_custom_mask, mask_indptr = segment_packbits(
3341	                custom_mask.contiguous().view(-1),
3342	                mask_indptr,
3343	                bitorder="little",
3344	            )
3345	
3346	        # NOTE(Zihao): only required if qo_indptr/paged_kv_indptr are device tensors
3347	        qo_indptr_host = qo_indptr.to("cpu")
3348	        kv_indptr_host = kv_indptr.to("cpu")
3349	
3350	        self._qo_indptr_last = int(qo_indptr_host[-1])
3351	        total_num_rows = self._qo_indptr_last
3352	
3353	        if self.is_cuda_graph_enabled:
3354	            if self._max_total_num_rows is None:
3355	                self._max_total_num_rows = total_num_rows
3356	            elif total_num_rows > self._max_total_num_rows:
3357	                raise ValueError(
3358	                    "The total number of rows in qo_indptr {} in cuda graph mode cannot "
3359	                    "exceed the number of rows set during initialization {}.".format(
3360	                        total_num_rows, self._max_total_num_rows
3361	                    )
3362	                )
3363	
3364	            if batch_size != self._fixed_batch_size:
3365	                raise ValueError(
3366	                    "The batch size should be fixed in cudagraph mode, the runtime batch size {} "
3367	                    " mismatches the batch size set during initialization {}.".format(
3368	                        batch_size, self._fixed_batch_size
3369	                    )
3370	                )
3371	            self._qo_indptr_buf.copy_(qo_indptr, non_blocking=non_blocking)
3372	            self._kv_indptr_buf.copy_(kv_indptr, non_blocking=non_blocking)
3373	            if packed_custom_mask is not None:
